constitutional_law.name: Constitutional Law
constitutional_law.description: Fundamental rights, constitutional remedies, articles, and constitutional powers.

criminal_law.name: Criminal Law
criminal_law.description: Offences, conviction, sentence, bail, police investigation, and criminal procedure.

civil_procedure.name: Civil Procedure
civil_procedure.description: Civil suits, decrees, appeals, injunctions, limitation, and procedural orders.

property_law.name: Property Law
property_law.description: Land, possession, tenancy, transfer, ownership, acquisition, and property disputes.

contract_law.name: Contract Law
contract_law.description: Agreements, contractual obligations, consideration, breach, damages, and commercial claims.

service_law.name: Service Law
service_law.description: Employment, public service, recruitment, promotion, dismissal, pension, and service benefits.

administrative_law.name: Administrative Law
administrative_law.description: Government action, public authorities, tribunals, delegated powers, and administrative review.

evidence_law.name: Evidence Law
evidence_law.description: Witnesses, admissibility, proof, documents, burden, and appreciation of evidence.

family_law.name: Family Law
family_law.description: Marriage, divorce, maintenance, succession, adoption, guardianship, and family rights.

tax_law.name: Tax Law
tax_law.description: Income tax, sales tax, excise, customs, assessment, and revenue disputes.

labor_law.name: Labor Law
labor_law.description: Industrial disputes, wages, workmen, factories, labour welfare, and employment conditions.

writ_jurisdiction.name: Writ Jurisdiction
writ_jurisdiction.description: Writ petitions and constitutional remedies such as mandamus, certiorari, habeas corpus, and prohibition.

statutory_interpretation.name: Statutory Interpretation
statutory_interpretation.description: Meaning, construction, applicability, sections, articles, rules, regulations, and statutory powers.

other.name: Other
other.description: Fallback label when the issue is not clearly covered by the main taxonomy.
